mapper.select: SELECT id, department_code AS code, department_name AS name, department_name AS label, department_name AS value, manager_name AS extraInfo FROM base_department WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, location_code AS code, location_name AS name, location_name AS label, location_name AS value, CONCAT_WS('-', building, floor_no, room_no) AS extraInfo FROM base_location WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, code, name, label, value, extraInfo FROM ( SELECT id, username AS code, real_name AS name, real_name AS label, real_name AS value, department AS extraInfo FROM sys_user WHERE status = 1 UNION SELECT id, CONCAT('KEEPER-', id) AS code, keeper AS name, keeper AS label, keeper AS value, NULL AS extraInfo FROM asset WHERE keeper IS NOT NULL AND keeper != '' AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY keeper ) t GROUP BY value ORDER BY value ASC
